filters.impact: Excludes every mods_by_base class outside the fixed 29-class planner scope.
filters.recommendation: replace only in a separately approved follow-up

filters.impact: Only referenced mods of selected classes proceed; this is scope selection, not proof of invalidity.
Only implicits of bases in selected classes are added.
prefix > suffix > implicit > special collapses multiple source sides to one primary side.
filters.recommendation: preserve sourceSides; avoid using primary side as full provenance

filters.impact: First sorted family becomes familyId; warnings would disclose multi-family records.
